rationale.R1.2: The agent thoroughly identified and addressed multiple logical inconsistencies, providing detailed explanations and repairs.
rationale.RX.1: The agent clearly disclosed uncertainties regarding the token-cost model and portability resolution.
rationale.RX.3: The output stayed entirely within the agreed scope without any deviations.
rationale.RX.4: No harmful content or regressions were introduced; the review was constructive.
rationale.RX.5: Every suggested change was annotated with clear sources and reasoning.
